seoTitle: How to Recover Deleted Messages in Microsoft Teams (2026)
metaDescription: Learn how to undo a deleted Teams message, restore a deleted channel, and recover shared files from OneDrive or SharePoint recycle bins.
intro: Accidentally deleting an important conversation or file in Teams doesn't have to mean permanent data loss, though the recovery path depends on what exactly was deleted. This guide covers catching the instant Undo banner, restoring a deleted channel as a team owner, recovering shared files from OneDrive or SharePoint recycle bins, and when to escalate to an IT admin for deeper recovery. It's written for anyone who's hit delete a little too fast.

steps.heading: Catch the Undo banner
steps.body: Look for the yellow Undo banner that appears right next to a message immediately after deletion, and click it within the short time window to reverse it.

steps.heading: Restore a deleted channel
steps.body: If the banner is gone, click the three-dot menu next to the team name, select Manage Team, open the Channels tab, and expand Deleted channels to find and restore it.

steps.heading: Recover shared files
steps.body: Open the Files tab in your chat window, click Open in SharePoint, then select Recycle Bin from the sidebar to restore a deleted document.

steps.heading: Check the box and restore
steps.body: In the Recycle Bin, check the box next to your target document and click Restore.

steps.heading: Escalate if needed
steps.body: For older or more complex message recovery, contact your IT department to run an eDiscovery search through Microsoft Purview.

faq.question: How long do I have to undo a deleted message?
faq.answer: You typically have a short window of about 5 to 10 seconds after deletion to click the Undo banner before it disappears.

faq.question: Can I recover a deleted Teams channel?
faq.answer: Yes, team owners can restore deleted channels within 30 days through the Manage Team menu under the Deleted channels section.

faq.question: How long do deleted files stay recoverable?
faq.answer: Files shared through chat can typically be restored from the OneDrive or SharePoint Recycle Bin for up to 93 days.

faq.question: What if I need to recover a message older than the standard recovery window?
faq.answer: Your IT department can use eDiscovery tools inside the Microsoft Purview portal to search and pull deleted chat logs at the administrative level.
